caption: A man with long hair tied back and glasses stands before a microphone, performing in front of a small audience. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest adorned with blue embroidery and a red and white patterned accessory at his chest. He holds a stringed instrument, partially visible as he plays. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are seen, including individuals with blonde and brown hair. The setting features a background of light brown horizontal blinds. A black box with the white text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in place, slightly shifting his facial expression and posture as he speaks or sings into the microphone, while the audience members remain relatively still.
